label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out how many penguins are less than 8 years old and weigh less than 12 kg. Let me start by going through each penguin one by one. First, the table has four penguins: Louis, Bernard, Vincent, and Gwen. Let me list out their details again to make sure I have them right. Louis: age 7, height 50 cm, weight 11 kg. Bernard: age 5, height 80 cm, weight 13 kg. Vincent: age 9, height 60 cm, weight 11 kg. Gwen: age 8, height 70 cm, weight 15 kg. The question is asking for penguins that are both less than 8 years old AND weigh less than 12 kg. So both conditions have to be true for the same penguin. Let me check each one: 1. Louis: Age is 7, which is less than 8. Weight is 11 kg, which is less than 12. So Louis meets both conditions. That's one. 2. Bernard: Age is 5, which is less than 8. Weight is 13 kg. Oh, 13 is more than 12, so he doesn't meet the weight condition. So Bernard doesn't count. 3. Vincent: Age is 9. Wait, 9 is more than 8, so he doesn't meet the age condition. Even though his weight is 11 kg, which is under 12, the age disqualifies him. So Vincent is out. 4. Gwen: Age is 8. The condition is less than 8, so 8 doesn't count. Her weight is 15 kg, which is over 12. So she doesn't meet either condition. So only Louis meets both criteria. Let me double-check. Louis is 7 (under 8) and 11 kg (under 12).
